title: lithocardium limum
intro: Lithocardium limum, also known as lithospermum officinale, is a flowering plant in the borage family that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of lithocardium limum lie in its ability to lower blood pressure, prevent blood clots, and act as a diuretic, making it an effective remedy for treating cardiovascular and urinary issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, preventing kidney stones, and alleviating symptoms of high blood pressure. Lithocardium limum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
